gradeDescription: A = I excelled at everything I did today!
whatIDidToday: played with as many buddies as possible
noteworthyComments: Today I spent lots of time outside enjoying the sunshine and playing fetch with my friends ☀️🎾🐶 To make things a little more challenging, I also practiced sit-stays in between throws, working on my patience and impulse control before chasing the toy again. It was such a fun way to end the week🐾✨
